# Persona Template

Use this template when adding a new persona to docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md

- Name:
- Role summary (1-2 sentences):
- Responsibilities (bulleted):
- Interaction with existing roles (how this persona collaborates/escates):
- Typical communication cadence:
- Example artifacts owned (e.g., runbooks, dashboards, design specs):
- On-call or contact (optional):

Suggested placement: Add new personas under "Additional Personas" with the same section format as existing entries.
